subcodes.first_line: O Kind Lord, these pure souls have soared unto the celestial realms and have ascended to the hidden world of the Kingdom of mysteries [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خداوند مهربانا این جانهای پاک بجهان افلاک شتافتند و بجهان پنهان ملکوت اسرار
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @love of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @soul; spirit after death
